title: gratiola hispida
intro: Gratiola hispida, also known as hispid pennywort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gratiola hispida include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver health. Gratiola hispida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
